prompt: Studio product photograph of a glossy white ceramic 11-ounce coffee mug with a generous C-shaped handle on the RIGHT side, sitting on a warm raw oak butcher-block surface. A thin wisp of steam rises from the mug's open top. The mug body is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO print, NO decals, NO graphics, NO text anywhere on the ceramic surface — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Slightly elevated three-quarter angle from upper-left, soft window light from camera-right catches the curved highlight on the mug's left edge. Slightly desaturated palette — the warm wood undertone is muted. Documentary product-catalog feel, NOT lifestyle morning-routine, NOT cafe-magazine. No coffee visible inside, no spoon, no people.
